title: Hydra setup-complete fingerprint
description: Marker written by scripts/hydra-setup.sh after the first-time setup wizard completes. Future session-greeting logic can check for this file to decide whether to nag a fresh operator. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-setup-wizard.md (ticket #168) and docs/specs/2026-05-23-setup-wizard-polish.md (ticket #172, adds repos_registered).

version.description: Schema version. Bumped if the fingerprint shape changes.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the wizard last completed.

mode.description: How the wizard was invoked. 'non-interactive' means CI / scripted install via flags.

repos_registered.description: How many repos the wizard successfully registered in state/repos.json on its last run. Lets a consumer distinguish 'setup completed, no repos yet' (0) from 'setup completed with repos' without re-parsing state/repos.json. Optional — fingerprints written before ticket #172 omit it. See docs/specs/2026-05-23-setup-wizard-polish.md.
